name: HIPAA Security Rule (45 CFR Part 164, Subparts C & E)
publisher: US Department of Health and Human Services

controls.summary: Security management process — risk analysis and risk management.
Workforce security — authorization and supervision of access.
evidence: IAM policy reviewed via cloud-iam scanner.

controls.summary: Information access management — minimum necessary access.
evidence: Zero open findings in family idor / authz / k8s-rbac-cluster-admin.
CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md documents the project's security defaults.

controls.summary: Technical safeguards — access control (unique user identification, automatic logoff, encryption/decryption).
evidence: Crypto findings cleared on PHI handling code.

controls.summary: Audit controls — record and examine activity in systems containing PHI.
evidence: MCP audit log + fix history present and hash-chained.

controls.summary: Integrity — PHI not altered or destroyed in an unauthorized manner.
evidence: Sigstore provenance verified for ML model files (if opt-in).

controls.summary: Transmission security — PHI in transit is protected.
